SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlotterysystem

Class CreateEventActivityTest

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlotterysystem.CreateEventActivityTest
public class CreateEventActivityTest extends Object
Tests the functionality of the CreateEventActivity this activity allows an organiser to create a new event or edit one that already exists it also verifies that event data is saved correctly in the database

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CreateEventActivityTest()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    createEventTest()
    test to see if an event object is created when a user creates an event
    void
    dataBaseUpdatedTest()
    test to see if event created is uploaded to the database
    void
    EventEditedTest()
    test to see if the edits made to the event actually change the the Event object and is saved to the database
    void
    EventEditOpenedTest()
    test to see that the event information is populated when an activity is opened with an event to be edited
    void
    geolocationRequirementSavedTest()
    test to see if creating an event with geolocation enabled saves the requirement in the database
    void
    ImageUploadedTest()
    test to see if an event created with a Image is uploads the link to the image and stores the image on the database
    void
    inputFieldsValidTest()
    test to see if event creation is prevented when the input fields are missing information
    void
    PosterUpdatedTest()
    test to see if an existing event poster can be updated in edit mode
    void
    privateEventHiddenFromListingAndQrTest()
    test to see if creating a private event keeps it off the public listing and hides the promotional QR code
    void
    publicEventGeneratesQrCodeTest()
    test to see if creating a public event allows the organiser to generate a promotional QR code

  • Method Details

    • createEventTest

      public void createEventTest() throws Exception
      test to see if an event object is created when a user creates an event
      Throws:
      Exception - if authentication, UI setup, or Firestore operations fail

    • publicEventGeneratesQrCodeTest

      public void publicEventGeneratesQrCodeTest() throws Exception
      test to see if creating a public event allows the organiser to generate a promotional QR code
      Throws:
      Exception - if authentication, UI setup, or Firestore operations fail

    • privateEventHiddenFromListingAndQrTest

      public void privateEventHiddenFromListingAndQrTest() throws Exception
      test to see if creating a private event keeps it off the public listing and hides the promotional QR code
      Throws:
      Exception - if authentication, UI setup, or Firestore operations fail

    • inputFieldsValidTest

      public void inputFieldsValidTest() throws Exception
      test to see if event creation is prevented when the input fields are missing information
      Throws:
      Exception - if authentication or UI setup fails

    • dataBaseUpdatedTest

      public void dataBaseUpdatedTest() throws Exception
      test to see if event created is uploaded to the database
      Throws:
      Exception - if authentication, UI setup, or Firestore operations fail

    • geolocationRequirementSavedTest

      public void geolocationRequirementSavedTest() throws Exception
      test to see if creating an event with geolocation enabled saves the requirement in the database
      Throws:
      Exception - if authentication, UI setup, or Firestore operations fail

    • ImageUploadedTest

      public void ImageUploadedTest() throws Exception
      test to see if an event created with a Image is uploads the link to the image and stores the image on the database
      Throws:
      Exception - if authentication, image setup, or Firestore operations fail

    • PosterUpdatedTest

      public void PosterUpdatedTest() throws Exception
      test to see if an existing event poster can be updated in edit mode
      Throws:
      Exception - if authentication, image setup, or Firestore operations fail

    • EventEditOpenedTest

      public void EventEditOpenedTest() throws Exception
      test to see that the event information is populated when an activity is opened with an event to be edited
      Throws:
      Exception

    • EventEditedTest

      public void EventEditedTest() throws Exception
      test to see if the edits made to the event actually change the the Event object and is saved to the database
      Throws:
      Exception
